## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` + `npm test` pass at repo root (CLI)
- [ ] If `platform/` changed: `cd platform && npm run build` and `cd platform/apps/api && npm test`
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` committed
- [ ] Related docs updated if behavior changed (`README`, `CAPABILITIES.md`, `REPOSITORY.md`, or `platform/README.md`)
